message:
test: add seqlock correctness and stress tests (bd-2g5.3)

Add comprehensive test suite for the new SeqLock concurrency primitive:
- Single-value read/write correctness
- Pair and triple consistency (no torn reads)
- Writer serialization under concurrent updates
- Metrics and tracing integration verification
- ThreadSanitizer-clean stress test

These tests validate the optimistic metadata read protocol added in the
seqlock module, ensuring readers never observe partially-written state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
